Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students who are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students who are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
